# Phase 143: Text Generator Flash Route Closure - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-04-29
**Status:** Ready for planning
**Mode:** Auto-generated by autonomous workflow for infrastructure/rule-compliance phase

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Close the remaining source-backed `TEXTGEN-04` blocker found by
`.planning/v1.17-MILESTONE-AUDIT.md`: parent and prefill flash/nonflash route selection must no
longer depend on `emel::text::generator::detail::flash_attention_supported(...)` or any equivalent
behavior-selecting `detail.hpp` helper output.

</domain>

<decisions>
## Implementation Decisions

### Rule Closure
- Runtime support predicates that decide flash vs nonflash routing belong in
  `src/emel/text/generator/guards.hpp` and are consumed by explicit parent/prefill SML transition
  rows.
- `detail.hpp` may keep already-selected flash execution helpers such as `run_kernel_flash(...)`,
  but it must not own helper outputs used by guards to decide which runtime route executes.
- Add a failing source-level regression before changing production code. The regression must catch
  the current `flash_attention_supported` guard-to-detail dependency and should not be limited to
  the five helper names from Phase 142.

### Evidence Repair
- Phase 142 and Phase 143 summary frontmatter must use `requirements-completed:` where the GSD
  workflow expects it.
- `MILESTONES.md`, `ROADMAP.md`, `STATE.md`, `REQUIREMENTS.md`, and the next milestone audit must
  agree on `TEXTGEN-04` status after execution.

### the agent's Discretion
All implementation choices are otherwise at the agent's discretion. Keep the change narrowly
scoped to route-predicate ownership, regression coverage, and closeout evidence. Do not widen model
family, fixture, sampling, tokenizer, formatter, benchmark, or public API scope.

</decisions>

<code_context>
## Existing Code Insights

### Reusable Assets
- `src/emel/text/generator/guards.hpp` already owns q8, packed q8, preselected argmax, and
  prefill readiness support predicates.
- `src/emel/text/generator/prefill/guards.hpp` can delegate to parent guard-owned helpers under
  `emel::text::generator::guard::detail`.
- `tests/text/generator/lifecycle_tests.cpp` already contains a source scan for forbidden
  guard-to-detail route predicates.

### Integration Points
- Parent decode flash/nonflash routing is selected by `guard::decode_flash_runtime_supported` in
  `src/emel/text/generator/sm.hpp`.
- Prefill flash/nonflash routing is selected by `prefill::guard::flash_runtime_supported` in
  `src/emel/text/generator/prefill/sm.hpp`.
- Maintained proof remains the generator/runtime test shard, domain-boundary check, paritychecker
  and benchmark actor-internal scans, and the scoped generation quality gate.

</code_context>

<specifics>
## Specific Ideas

- Start by broadening `generator_route_guards_do_not_delegate_behavior_selection_to_detail_helpers`
  so it fails on `emel::text::generator::detail::flash_attention_supported(`.
- Move the pure support predicate into `emel::text::generator::guard::detail`.
- Update parent and prefill guards to call the guard-owned predicate.
- Keep detail execution helpers on the already-selected flash/nonflash paths.

</specifics>

<deferred>
## Deferred Ideas

Broader generator detail extraction remains out of scope unless required to close the route
ownership blocker.

</deferred>
